data.title: Optiva Inc. signed Support Agreement with 85% of Senior Secured Notes, allowing 45 days for transaction negotiations.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Optiva Inc. (TSX: OPT) disclosed that they have engaged in a support agreement with holders of about 85% of their total principal amount of 9.75% senior secured PIK toggle notes, which are scheduled to mature on July 20, 2025. Optiva, a leading provider of cloud-native billing, charging, and revenue management software for the telecom sector, aims to enhance its services through the agreement with the noteholders.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics granted 138,190 shares of stock options to 20 new employees on July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, biotechnology company Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA) based in San Carlos, California, granted a total of 138,190 shares of its common stock as inducement stock options to 20 new non-executive employees. The company, which specializes in developing innovative polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (“TIL”) therapies for cancer patients, made this announcement on July 18, 2025.

data.title: CRYPTOSOLO introduces AI-Powered Multi-Asset Cloud Mining, offering passive income with a $15 startup. No equipment needed.
data.description: London, UK - July 18, 2025 - CRYPTOSOLO, a leading global cryptocurrency cloud mining company, has introduced its advanced "AI-Powered Multi-Asset Cloud Mining" service. This innovative platform uses artificial intelligence technology and adaptable infrastructure to provide secure, automated, and lucrative passive income opportunities for individuals in more than 190 countries. With an initial investment as low as $15, users can engage in the mining of popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC), Dogecoin (DOGE), Litecoin (LTC), and Solana (SOL) without needing technical expertise or specialized mining equipment. The AI-Powered Cloud Mining service by CRYPTOSOLO operates through AURA, its AI engine, which dynamically distributes computing power among various coins based on current market trends, mining complexity, and reward systems. This strategy allows users to optimize their returns without being restricted to a single asset or fixed mining scheme. According to CRYPTOSOLO's CEO, this service can be likened to "autopilot for your crypto income," enabling users to capitalize on the potential of multiple cryptocurrencies effortlessly. For additional details, the complete article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla drive-in restaurant with Supercharger stations nearing completion in Hollywood, California, with '50s-themed diner open 24/7. Musk's dream becoming reality. Tesla may accept Dogecoin.
data.description: Entrepreneur Elon Musk's vision from 2018 to establish a Tesla drive-in restaurant encompassing movie screens, a diner, and Supercharger stations is close to fruition and potentially accessible to the general public in the near future. Initially mentioned in a tweet by Musk in 2018, where he expressed his desire to launch a drive-in eatery, this idea is now materializing. Situated in Hollywood, California, the Supercharger site, dating back to Musk's tweet, embodies aspects of a classic drive-in with roller skates and a rock-themed restaurant. Recent reports indicate that construction at the location is finalized, with final touches being put in place prior to an official opening announcement. Sources suggest the diner, styled after the ’50s era, would operate around the clock seven days a week, based on signage observed on the establishment's entrance. Moreover, the presence of a Tesla Optimus bot within the premises hints at the incorporation of advanced technology by Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) in this innovative project. For more details, the complete narrative can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Radiate Holdco, LLC released Q1 2025 financial results, announced on July 18, 2025 in Princeton, NJ.
data.description: A company based in Princeton, New Jersey, Radiate Holdco, LLC ("Radiate"), revealed its financial performance for the First Quarter of 2025 on July 18, 2025. The results were made available on the company's secure investor website, adhering to the guidelines outlined in the Indentures governing Radiate.

data.title: Acadian Timber Corp. to release 2025 Q2 results on Aug. 6, 2025. Conference call on Aug. 7, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. ET. Website for more info.
data.description: Acadian Timber Corp, based in Edmundston, New Brunswick, will be sharing its second quarter results for 2025 on August 6, 2025, after the market closes, as per an announcement made on July 18, 2025. The financial statement will be accessible on their official website at www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information/. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for August 7, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time where senior management will delve into the financial and operational outcomes.

data.title: Lake Shore Bancorp completes conversion, begins trading on Nasdaq as "LSBK" on July 21, 2025.
data.description: Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: LSBK) in Dunkirk, NY, has announced the completion of the conversion of Lake Shore, MHC to a stock form, along with a stock offering. The bank, now a New York chartered commercial bank, finalized these changes after the business day ended. Lake Shore Bancorp's common stock will commence trading on the Nasdaq Global Market with the ticker symbol "LSBK" on July 21, 2025.

data.title: Premier Health Partners reports cyber incident affecting privacy of certain individuals' info on July 12, 2023.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Dayton, Ohio, Premier Health Partners (referred to as Premier Health) has announced a cyber incident that could compromise the privacy of specific individuals. This breach was identified on July 12, 2023, prompting Premier Health to take action...

data.title: Oak Valley Bancorp reported Q2 2025 consolidated net income of $5.6M (EPS $0.67), down from $5.89M a year ago and $5.3M in the prior quarter.
data.description: Recently, Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), the holding company for Oak Valley Community Bank and Eastern Sierra Community Bank, announced its unaudited financial results. For the quarter ending June 30, 2025, the company reported a consolidated net income of $5,588,000, translating to $0.67 earnings per share (EPS). This was a slight increase from the previous quarter's $5,297,000 ($0.64 EPS) but lower than the $5,889,000 ($0.71 EPS) from the same period last year. Looking at the first six months of 2025, the consolidated net income was $10,885,000 ($1.31 EPS), down from the $11,616,000 ($1.41 EPS) recorded during the first half of 2024.

data.title: Linkage Global Inc secures $3.5M convertible note financing, potential for $30M total funding for growth initiatives.
data.description: A provider of cross-border e-commerce services has successfully concluded a strategic private placement to bolster its growth strategies. The company raised a significant sum of funds through this placement to support its expansion plans and enhance its operations in the digital marketplace. This move is aimed at positioning the company for robust growth and increased market presence in the e-commerce sector.

data.title: Aventis Energy accelerates expiry date for common share purchase warrants issued on May 8, 2025, exercisable at C$0.10.
data.description: Aventis Energy, headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, made an announcement on July 18, 2025, regarding the acceleration of the expiry date of its common share purchase warrants. The warrants were initially issued as part of a private placement financing on May 8, 2025, with an exercise price of C$0.10 per common share. The company, trading under the symbols CSE: AVE, FRA: C0O0, and OTC: VBAMF, has decided to expedite the expiry date of these warrants, known as the May 2025 Warrants.
